name: view_1_venue_win_rate
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1_venue_win_rate AS SELECT venue, team, (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN match_outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(match_id)) AS win_rate FROM match_summary JOIN detailed_player_data ON match_summary.match_id = detailed_player_data.match_id GROUP BY venue, team

name: view_3_team_win_rate
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3_team_win_rate AS SELECT venue, team_type, (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN match_outcome = 'win' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(match_id)) AS win_rate FROM match_summary JOIN (SELECT match_id, CASE WHEN match_summary.match_type = 'home' THEN 'home' ELSE 'away' END AS team_type FROM match_summary) AS team_info ON match_summary.match_id = team_info.match_id GROUP BY venue, team_type

name: view_5_season_match_count
SQL: CREATE VIEW view_5_season_match_count AS SELECT season, venue, COUNT(match_id) AS match_count FROM match_summary GROUP BY season, venue
